concepts.label: post_cabg_respiratory_distress
concepts.recommendation: For post-CABG breathlessness, evaluate fluid overload and pulmonary edema, monitor oxygen saturation trends, and repeat ECG if symptoms persist.

concepts.label: hyperglycemia_grbs
concepts.recommendation: If capillary glucose exceeds 250 mg/dL, consider correctional insulin, hydration review, and repeat bedside glucose in 1-2 hours.

concepts.label: dvt_prophylaxis_post_op
concepts.recommendation: Standard prophylaxis is enoxaparin 40 mg subcutaneous once daily with renal and bleeding risk adjustment.

concepts.label: asthma_exacerbation
concepts.recommendation: For acute wheeze, monitor respiratory rate and oxygen saturation after bronchodilator administration and reassess if distress continues.
